## Bernstein Raises Price Target on ASML Holding

Sell-side PT raises on ASML are supportive of the lithography monopoly thesis but not independent catalysts; PM should note the accumulation of analyst constructiveness as a sentiment backdrop ahead of TSM and LRCX results this week.

- Bernstein increased its price target on ASML; no new target level or prior target specified in the headline.
- No fundamental catalyst or new product announcement cited; this is incremental sell-side conviction.
- Reinforces constructive positioning on ASML's EUV/lithography roadmap and competitive moat.
- Single-outlet, single-analyst signal—limited standalone weight.
